title: 211INFO RESOURCE DEPARTMENT - 211info
text: 211INFO 211INFO RESOURCE DEPARTMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The 211info Resource Department maintains and updates an informational database (ReferNet) which provides comprehensive information and referral of social services to community members. Provides assistance to community partners that need to update or change their listing in the 211info databse, or those looking to get listed. For childcare providers, 211info utilizes the Find Child Care Oregon (FCCO) statewide database for referrals. Updates to that system can be made through the local Child Care Resource and Referral (CCR&R) agency. Eligibility: Providers with records in the 211info database and those looking to get listed Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email (503) 416-2698 .211. Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers 211 211info (503) 222-5555 Alternate (503) 226-3099 Administrative Line 898211 Text Short Code Main phone (503) 416-2698 Resource Department Kurt Perkins [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: -Call, email, or visit website. Voicemail option after-hours or if specialists are unavailable. -To contact the FCCO database, contact the local CCR&R agency FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: 211 Systems Directory/Resource List Publication Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - 211INFO DCM LINE DISASTER SERVICES - GORGE CITIZEN ALERT PROGRAM DISASTER SERVICES - SEVERE WINTER WEATHER INFORMATION SERVICES DISASTER SERVICES - WINTER AND SEVERE WEATHER INFORMATION SERVICES MULTNOMAH COUNTY FOOD - 211INFO SNAP AND FOOD ACCESS HOUSING/SHELTER - COORDINATED ENTRY FOR FAMILIES MULTNOMAH COUNTY HOUSING/SHELTER - MULTNOMAH COUNTY EVICTION PREVENTION PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - MULTNOMAH COUNTY FAMILY SHELTER WAITLIST INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211INFO CHILD CARE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211INFO COORDINATION CENTER INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211INFO RESOURCE PARENT SUPPORT INFORMATION SERVICES - 211INFO ICE IMPACT SUPPORT INFORMATION SERVICES - 211INFO INFORMATION AND REFERRAL INFORMATION SERVICES - 211INFO OUTREACH AND MATERIALS REQUESTS INFORMATION SERVICES - OREGON HIV/STD HOTLINE MONEY MANAGEMENT - 211INFO FINANCIAL WELLNESS UTILITIES - 211INFO UTILITY ASSISTANCE UPDATES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
